title: Lyon drug traffickers hire Colombian hitmen to kill their rivals
subhead: Criminal cases involving Colombian nationals have become increasingly common in the Lyon area. According to the police, these individuals are believed to be mercenaries hired by French drug trafficking kingpins to terrorize or eliminate their rivals.

title: 2030 Alps Games already facing storm of internal controversies and public backlash

Giorgia Meloni's strong poll numbers, a deceptive success
subhead: Although 71% of Italians believe their country is headed in the 'wrong direction,' Italy's prime minister, Giorgia Meloni, continues to enjoy significant public trust. High voter abstention, an aging electorate and a divided opposition contribute to this apparent paradox.

title: Dozens of troops dead in Mexican violence after drug kingpin killed
subhead: Violent clashes erupted after the death of Nemesio 'El Mencho' Oseguera, leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG), was announced on Sunday, following a shootout with soldiers.

title: The 'impossible' task of counting deaths at sea
subhead: The International Organization for Migration and migrant aid NGOs simultaneously record deaths at sea in the Mediterranean and Atlantic, but often come up with very different figures. Why?

title: With expected US retreat, Germany seeks to strengthen its role within NATO
subhead: Berlin has invested hundreds of billions of euros to rearm since Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022 and aims to play a major role within the North Atlantic Alliance, particularly as the US moves toward isolation.

AI has arrived in France's local elections – for better or worse
subhead: From creating campaign videos to writing speeches, artificial intelligence has become an effective tool for candidates. However, it also raises ethical questions, prompting some elected officials to call for regulation.

title: 2026 Winter Olympics: New infrastructure raises financial and environmental questions
subhead: The anticipated increase in visitor numbers to the protected Alpine regions is the first major impact expected from the Games. Critics have condemned what they call the 'gentrification of the mountains.'

title: Karyna Shuliak was Jeffrey Epstein's last partner and main heiress. She won't benefit from his will
subhead: The Belarusian woman met the sexual predator when she was 20 and remained loyal to him until his suicide in prison in 2019.
